completed_tasks: Preserved the existing form-first audio-to-score workflow, validators, and explicit one-skill synchronization behavior.
Added an optional post-validation publication handoff as 12_publication_handoff.json.
Defined a consumer manifest that carries song identity, approved form, layout intent, score parts, exported assets, disclosures, approvals, and warnings.
Made the approved form digest visible before notation a publication requirement.
Set four measures per system as the preferred readable 4/4 songbook layout while preserving section authority, shorter final systems, and responsive fallback.
Added consumer verification for all requested parts, generated provenance, first/middle/final systems, asset delivery, responsive width, and playback.
Installed the updated repository source into the active Codex audio-to-score skill and confirmed zero drift.
notes: The handoff is derived from 11_final_score.json and exported assets; it is not a second musical source of truth.
The four-measure system rule is a preferred layout, not permission to alter approved form or compress unreadable notation.
No rendered product UI or song data changed in this refinement.
